name: pretable
description: A React data grid for AI product surfaces with wrapped text, variable-height rows, streaming-friendly rendering, and benchmarked virtualization.

scripts.api: pnpm --filter @pretable/core api && pnpm --filter @pretable/react api && pnpm --filter @pretable/ui api && pnpm --filter @pretable/stream-adapter api
scripts.api:check: pnpm --filter @pretable/core api:check && pnpm --filter @pretable/react api:check && pnpm --filter @pretable/ui api:check && pnpm --filter @pretable/stream-adapter api:check
scripts.lint:packaging: pnpm --filter @pretable/core lint:packaging && pnpm --filter @pretable/react lint:packaging && pnpm --filter @cacheplane/json-stream lint:packaging && pnpm --filter @pretable/stream-adapter lint:packaging && pnpm --filter @pretable/ui lint:packaging
scripts.test: node --test scripts/__tests__/bench-e2e.test.mjs scripts/__tests__/bench-matrix.test.mjs && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' test && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter './apps/*' test
